summary: Backend-only validation completed via static review and repository checks for real HTTP activation changes. Execution of C++ unit tests was blocked because CMake is not installed in this container.

critical.issue: HttpActivationClient marks empty 2xx response as failure. If API returns 204 No Content on successful deactivation, parseActivationResponse forces success=false and LicenseManager::deactivateActivation fails.

minor.issue: TestLicensing.cpp only validates missing config path for HttpActivationClient; no unit coverage for env config loading, header override, activate/refresh/deactivate endpoint payloads, or certificate response-shape normalization paths.
cmake is missing in this environment, so Catch2 build/run and runtime verification were not executed.

action_items: Handle HTTP 204/empty-body success for deactivate when requireCertificate=false.

Add unit tests for: configFromEnvironment/createFromEnvironment, configurable header default+override, request body fields for activate/refresh/deactivate, and both certificate response shapes (including raw JSON certificate_payload normalization).
Run full CMake + Catch2 test suite in an environment with cmake/JUCE toolchain.
critical_code_review_comments: PluginProcessor.cpp (2259 lines) and PluginProcessor.h (697 lines) are at/over maintainability thresholds; continue splitting licensing orchestration and non-audio concerns into focused modules.
LicenseVerifier still supports development signature trust path; ensure production cryptographic verifier is enforced for release builds.

success_rate.backend: 50% (static validation complete; runtime tests blocked by missing cmake)
success_rate.methodology: Computed as a weighted sum of verification stages: 35% static code review, 15% local syntax checks, 25% unit tests, 25% end-to-end integration tests.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified requested feature mapping in code: env vars, endpoints, request fields, configurable client header, required cert for activate/refresh, optional cert for deactivate, LicenseManager constructor using createFromEnvironment, refresh/deactivate methods present, docs updated. Found deactivation empty-body handling bug and test coverage gaps. Also corrected prior iteration claim: loadCachedCertificate is called in PluginProcessor::loadCachedLicenseIfNeeded.
rca of the issue: RCA: parseActivationResponse() treats any empty response body as failure, even for 2xx. Repro path: deactivate() -> post_(..., requireCertificate=false) -> parseActivationResponse(204, "", false) sets success=false. Mitigation: when status is 2xx and requireCertificate is false, accept empty response as success (with status/message) instead of forcing failure.
